tagline: Burbank's Most Trusted Auto Repair Since Day One

hero.heading: Expert Auto Repair You Can Count On
hero.subheading: Family-owned auto shop in Burbank providing honest, reliable car repair and maintenance. 4.9 stars from 134+ happy customers.

about.heading: About J's Auto Clinic
paragraphs: J's Auto Clinic is a full-service auto repair shop located in the heart of Burbank, California. We specialize in everything from routine oil changes and brake services to complex engine diagnostics and transmission repairs.

Our ASE-certified technicians treat every vehicle like their own. We believe in transparent pricing, honest assessments, and getting you back on the road safely. Whether you drive a domestic, European, or Asian vehicle, we have the expertise to handle it.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics
services.description: State-of-the-art computer diagnostics to pinpoint issues fast and accurately. Check engine light? We'll find the cause.

services.title: Brake Service
services.description: Complete brake inspection, pad replacement, rotor resurfacing, and brake fluid flush to keep you stopping safely.

services.title: Oil Change & Tune-Up
services.description: Routine maintenance including oil changes, filter replacements, spark plugs, and fluid top-offs to extend your vehicle's life.

services.title: Transmission Repair
services.description: Full transmission diagnostics, fluid service, and repair for both automatic and manual transmissions.

services.title: A/C & Heating
services.description: Climate control system diagnosis and repair. Stay comfortable year-round with a properly functioning A/C and heater.

services.title: Tire & Alignment
services.description: Tire rotation, balancing, wheel alignment, and new tire installation to keep your ride smooth and safe.

reviews.name: Daniel R.
reviews.text: Honest and fair pricing. They diagnosed my engine issue in 30 minutes and had me back on the road the same day. Best shop in Burbank.

reviews.name: Maria L.
reviews.text: I've been coming here for years. They always explain what needs to be done and never push unnecessary repairs. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Kevin T.
reviews.text: Great work on my transmission. Other shops quoted me double. J's Auto Clinic is the real deal — fair prices and quality work.

seo.title: J's Auto Clinic | Trusted Auto Repair in Burbank CA
seo.description: J's Auto Clinic in Burbank CA offers expert auto repair, engine diagnostics, brake service, oil changes, and more. 4.9 stars, 134+ reviews. Call (818) 562-1414.
